text.title: Team Morale Pulse Survey Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observed signals (team_size, responses_received, response_rate, axis medians, prior-week scores) to suppress / report / alert / pause.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — anonymity impossible at this team size; use direct 1:1s
suppress per-axis medians; publish only response counts and 'pulse paused' note

branch.question: PM can complete 1:1s within 48 business hours if alerts fire?

conclusion.verdict: pause survey this week; running pulse without action capability destroys trust

branch.question: eNPS_drop > 20 OR any axis median < 6 OR response_rate < 0.5?

conclusion.verdict: emit alert(s) with due_by = trigger + 48 business hours; book 1:1s before due_by
report-only; continue weekly cadence; do NOT add questions for next week

text.example: team_size=6 → responses=5 → rate=0.83 → anonymity_met=true → PM ready → eNPS dropped 28 (> 20) → emit alert; workload median 3 (< 6) → emit alert.
